name: OnDeck SMB Lending API
what_it_does: OnDeck SMB lending REST API for fintech platforms, banks, and marketplace partners to embed small business term loans and lines of credit for US SMBs with same-day funding and data-driven underwriting. Enables AI agents to manage SMB loan application submission for embedded term loan and LOC automation, handle proprietary OnDeck Score underwriting for credit assessment automation, access same-day funding capability for fast SMB capital automation, retrieve term loan and line of credit offer generation for lending product automation, manage loan servicing and repayment tracking for portfolio management automation, handle bank partnership and white-label lending deployment for bank-as-a-service automation, access daily ACH repayment scheduling for SMB loan repayment automation, retrieve renewal and refinancing eligibility for customer lifecycle automation, manage prepayment tracking and payoff calculation for loan lifecycle automation, and integrate OnDeck with bank cores, CRM, and accounting platforms for end-to-end embedded SMB lending.
use_cases: Embedding term loans from bank partnership lending agents
Underwriting SMBs from alternative credit scoring agents
Funding same-day loans from fast capital automation agents
Servicing daily repayments from loan portfolio agents
not_for: Consumer personal lending (US SMB business only)
Real estate investment lending (business operations only)
Non-US businesses (OnDeck operates in US only)
best_when: A US fintech, bank, or marketplace wanting AI agents to embed SMB term loans and lines of credit with same-day funding, data-driven underwriting via OnDeck Score, and daily ACH repayment management.
avoid_when: DAILY ACH REPAYMENT IMPACT ON SMB CASH FLOW: OnDeck daily ACH repayment debits borrower bank account every business day; automated cash flow planning for SMB borrowers must account for daily repayment deductions; automated cash management that treats bank balance as available without subtracting daily OnDeck repayment creates overdraft at critical operating moments. ONDECK SCORE PROPRIETARY MODEL OPACITY: OnDeck underwriting uses proprietary OnDeck Score including alternative data; automated lending platform cannot fully predict OnDeck credit decision from traditional credit bureau data alone; automated pre-qualification tools must acknowledge OnDeck Score variability and avoid over-promising approval probability. EQUAL CREDIT OPPORTUNITY ACT ADVERSE ACTION COMPLIANCE: Automated SMB loan decline via OnDeck API must include ECOA-compliant adverse action notice; automated decline workflow without adverse action notice within required period creates ECOA violation; implement adverse action notice generation and delivery in automated decline workflow.

auth.notes: OnDeck uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for partner integrations. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2006 by Mitch Jacobs. Went public (NYSE: ONDK) 2014; taken private by Enova International in 2020 acquisition. $15B+ lent to 100,000+ businesses. Products: Term Loans ($5K-$250K), Line of Credit ($6K-$100K), daily/weekly repayment options. Proprietary OnDeck Score using alternative data. Bank partnership products (ODX platform). US-only operations. Competes with Kabbage (now American Express Business Blueprint), Funding Circle, and BlueVine for US SMB lending.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — origination fee and interest on loans funded
pricing.paid_tiers: Origination fee; daily/weekly interest (factor rate model); partner revenue share for embedded lending programs
pricing.notes: New York NY. Enova International subsidiary (formerly NYSE: ONDK). Factor rate pricing. Partner revenue share. US only.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; application and servicing queries throttled; webhooks for application, decision, funding, and repayment events

known_agent_gotchas: FACTOR RATE vs APR DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENT: OnDeck uses factor rate pricing (e.g., 1.15-1.50x) rather than traditional APR; CFPB and state lending regulations may require APR disclosure in addition to factor rate; automated lending disclosure generation must include APR calculation from factor rate to meet disclosure requirements in applicable states

DAILY ACH FAILED PAYMENT HANDLING: Daily OnDeck ACH repayment will fail if borrower bank account has insufficient funds; automated loan portfolio monitoring must handle daily ACH return codes; automated re-presentment logic after ACH return must comply with NACHA re-presentment rules (maximum 2 re-presentments for NSF)

SAME-DAY FUNDING BUSINESS HOUR DEPENDENCY: OnDeck same-day funding requires application completion before afternoon cutoff; automated fast-capital workflows advertising same-day funding must validate cutoff compliance; automated application submission after cutoff creates next-business-day funding that misrepresents same-day capability

LINE OF CREDIT RENEWAL CREDIT PULL: OnDeck line of credit renewal may involve fresh credit pull; automated renewal workflow must obtain borrower authorization for additional credit inquiry; automated renewal without fresh credit authorization creates unauthorized credit inquiry FCRA violation

ENOVA PARENT COMPANY POLICY CHANGES: OnDeck operates as Enova International subsidiary since 2020 acquisition; Enova policy changes may affect OnDeck product terms, underwriting, and partnership programs; automated lending programs built on OnDeck should monitor Enova corporate communications for policy changes affecting partner API access
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB lending. ECOA, TILA, CFPB, FinCEN. OAuth2/API key. US. Business loan application and servicing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB lending. ECOA, TILA, CFPB, FinCEN. OAuth2/API key. US. Business loan and repayment data.
